Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [checkoutservice] in Trace data showing checkoutservice→paymentservice latency anomalies (From GT key_observations keyword list)
Step 7: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [pod_cpu_usage] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)
